function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0005
alias: northstar_followup_pack
issued_on: 2026-03-26
total_eur: 420
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 180
    line_eur: 180
---
# Northstar follow-up pack invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0005                      |
| alias          | northstar_followup_pack       |
| issued_on      | 2026-03-26                    |
| total_eur      | 420                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
| 2 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 180      | 180      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 420      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Later invoice after a narrower product pass, still uncomfortably close to consulting if Miles is honest.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed inbox request, migrated invoice note to schema frontmatter, deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted /00_inbox/000_next-task.md after successful completion of requested structured-record maintenance.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and completed the requested OCR/frontmatter migration for `50_finance/invoices/2026_03_26__eur_000420__inv_0005__northstar_followup_pack.md`. Added schema-compliant invoice YAML frontmatter extracted from visible note data, preserved the original note body verbatim beneath the frontmatter, kept the change focused, and removed the processed inbox item `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read 99_system and relevant workflows before task work, used finance schema for exact fields, preserved existing body exactly under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from the inbox request file explicitly asked for OCR/frontmatter migration of the specified invoice. The target invoice contained all required schema fields and line items, enabling a complete, non-guessing migration per `migrate-records-to-frontmatter.md` and `finance-record-frontmatter.md`. After successful write, inbox cleanup was required by `process-next-inbox-item.md` and `inbox-processing-v2-update.md` and was completed.
